github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Commit messages for this repository must use Conventional Commits + gitmoji: `<type>(<scope>): <emoji> <description>`. Scope is optional; when used, pick ONE of: docs, lib-typescript, lib-devcontainer, lib-action, build, deps, deps-dev, CI-CD. Never invent a scope. Type→emoji: feat→✨, fix→🐛, docs→📝, refactor→♻️, test→✅, chore→🔧, perf→⚡️, style→💄, ci→👷, build→📦️, revert→⏪️ (pick the most specific: 🚑️ hotfix, ⬆️ dep upgrade, 🩹 trivial, 🔥 remove code). Always include exactly ONE emoji. Description ≤72 chars, English, lowercase, imperative, no period. Multiple changes → bullet list in body.
